messages.content: I need a controller for the 2021 megatron 1000 watt dual motor bike
For the 2021 Megatron 1000 watt dual motor bike, the controller part number is RP-06-07-01. Just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
I've created a secure order link for you. Click the link to review and complete your purchase: https://www.rambobikes.com/57696747655/invoices/7f8b7d2ca39555f972d2e05accbf14df
